candidate_paths.name: AI Agent Integration Path
candidate_paths.relationship_to_primary_path: Alternative path targeting AI agents rather than general developers; shares steps like API key setup and sending messages but includes agent-specific tooling installation.
candidate_paths.selection_basis: Documented onboarding for AI coding agents using Courier's MCP server and CLI tooling.

steps.action: Sign up or log in to Courier dashboard.
Copy API key from Settings > API Keys.
details: Locate API key in dashboard settings.

steps.action: Set environment variable COURIER_API_KEY with the API key.
Install AI agent tooling such as Courier CLI and configure MCP server.
details: Add MCP server configuration with API key.
steps.output: Configured MCP server for AI agent.
steps.success_signal: Agent tooling ready to send messages.

steps.action: Send first message using CLI or curl with AI agent tooling.
details: Use example commands to send message with routing method single.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Message delivered as shown in Message Logs timeline

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A notification message is successfully sent using the API key and appears as delivered in the Courier dashboard logs.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Message appears in Message Logs with timeline stages: accepted, routed, rendered, sent, and delivered.
documented_first_success.official_milestone: Send a notification message via the Courier API and verify its delivery in the dashboard logs.
documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The documentation explicitly defines sending a message and seeing it delivered in the dashboard logs as the first success milestone for developers integrating Courier.

assumed_prior_state: Developer has internet access and a modern development environment.
Developer can sign up for a Courier account.
Developer can access Courier dashboard to retrieve API key.
entry_point.developer_intent: Send a notification using Courier's API to verify integration and delivery.

friction_gates.description: User must create a Courier account to obtain API key.
API key is required to authenticate API calls.
Correctly format and send API request with valid recipient and message content.
Access to Courier dashboard Message Logs to verify delivery.

prerequisites.requirement: Sign up for a Courier account at https://app.courier.com/signup.
Obtain an API key from the Courier dashboard under Settings > API Keys.
Have a development environment capable of making HTTP requests or running SDKs/CLI (e.g., curl, Node.js, Python).

primary_path.action: Sign up or log in to Courier dashboard.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Authentication failure or account creation errors.

primary_path.action: Copy API key from Settings > API Keys in the dashboard.
details: Locate API key in dashboard settings.
Copy key for use in API calls.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: API key not found or permission denied.

primary_path.action: Set environment variable COURIER_API_KEY with the copied API key.
details: Export environment variable in shell or set in development environment.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Environment variable not set or inaccessible.
primary_path.success_signal: Environment variable accessible to SDK or CLI.

primary_path.action: Send a notification message using curl, CLI, or SDK with the API key.
details: Use provided example payload with recipient email, message content, and routing method.
Replace placeholders YOUR_API_KEY and you@example.com appropriately.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: API errors such as authentication failure or malformed request.
primary_path.input: API key, recipient email, message content JSON.
primary_path.success_signal: Response includes a requestId indicating message accepted.

primary_path.action: Open Message Logs in Courier dashboard to verify message delivery status.
details: Check timeline stages: accepted, routed, rendered, sent, delivered.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Message not found or delivery failed.
primary_path.output: Message delivery timeline visible in dashboard.
primary_path.success_signal: Message shows delivered status in logs.

sources.title: Developer Docs: Multichannel Notification API - Courier

sections_used: What you need before writing any code
Quick Reference: Copy for Cursor / Claude
sources.title: Agent Quickstart - Courier

alternatives_considered.name: Visual Dashboard and Design Studio
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: While the visual dashboard and Design Studio are important for content design and lifecycle marketing, the documented first success for developers is sending a notification via the API.

alternatives_considered.name: AI Agent Integration via MCP Server and CLI
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Targeted at AI coding agents, this is a specialized integration path rather than the primary onboarding for general developers.

surface.name: REST API with SDKs and CLI
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation emphasizes sending notifications via a single REST API call, supported by multiple server SDKs (Node.js, Python, Ruby, Go) and a CLI tool, making this the primary developer surface for first-mile onboarding.
